models_run: GBPUSD: GARCH_normal, GARCH_t, GJR_GARCH, EWMA, Historical
EURGBP: GARCH_normal, GARCH_t, GJR_GARCH, EWMA, Historical
models_skipped: IV models: paper's source for FX implied volatility is unclear. Yahoo Finance does not provide FX option-implied vol for these pairs. Reproduction excludes IV; ranking among GARCH-family + EWMA is what we test.

paper_claim.EURGBP: GARCH or GARCH+OLS+IV wins per paper abstract

our_test: Apply DM/MCS/SPA to {GARCH, EWMA, GJR-GARCH, GARCH-t, Historical} to test whether GARCH wins are statistically significant.
